name: United Arab Emirates
fx_cross_border_restriction: No broad retail FX prohibition; regulated reporting and AML requirements apply.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Permitted under federal and free-zone regulatory frameworks with licensing.

name: Philippines
fx_cross_border_restriction: Convertible for current account transactions with BSP reporting and AML controls.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: VASP framework exists; new non-bank VASP licensing has had restrictive windows.

name: Mexico
fx_cross_border_restriction: FX transactions are generally open, with compliance obligations and reporting.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Regulated entities face restrictions on offering crypto directly to retail clients.

name: Brazil
fx_cross_border_restriction: Cross-border FX is liberalized for many flows with registration and tax/reporting constraints.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Virtual asset framework exists and licensing requirements are tightening.

name: Hong Kong
fx_cross_border_restriction: Highly open FX regime with strong AML and sanctions compliance requirements.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Licensed framework for exchanges and dedicated stablecoin regulation pathway.

name: Saudi Arabia
fx_cross_border_restriction: Cross-border flows are active but virtual-asset usage remains tightly supervised.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: No broad retail legalization; sandbox and supervisory pilots are preferred path.

name: United States
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open current account with extensive AML, sanctions, and money-transmitter controls.
fx_regulation_name: Bank Secrecy Act and state/federal money transmission rules
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Permitted with compliance controls; policy remains fragmented across agencies.

name: United Kingdom
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open regime with strong AML and sanctions screening obligations.
fx_regulation_name: Payment Services Regulations and FCA framework
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Regulated access via FCA registration and ongoing stablecoin regime development.

name: Australia
fx_cross_border_restriction: Generally open with AML obligations for remittance and digital-asset providers.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Permissive but supervised via AML and market-conduct rules.

name: Singapore
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market with strict AML/CFT and licensing requirements.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: MAS licensing framework and stablecoin-specific requirements are in place.

name: Colombia
fx_cross_border_restriction: FX transactions require registration; controls on capital movements apply.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: No explicit prohibition; sandbox environment for fintech and crypto firms.

name: Argentina
fx_cross_border_restriction: Strict capital controls (cepo cambiario); multiple exchange rates and restrictions on USD purchases.
fx_regulator_body: Banco Central de la República Argentina
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto is not legal tender; BCRA has restricted bank involvement; VASP registration required by CNV.

name: Chile
fx_cross_border_restriction: Generally open FX market with reporting requirements for large transactions.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Fintech law provides framework; CMF supervises crypto service providers.

name: India
fx_cross_border_restriction: Current account convertible; capital account has significant controls under FEMA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: 30% tax on crypto gains; 1% TDS on transfers; RBI cautious but no outright ban.

name: Indonesia
fx_cross_border_restriction: FX transactions regulated; hedging requirements and reporting obligations apply.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto traded as commodities under Bappebti; OJK to take over supervision.

name: South Africa
fx_cross_border_restriction: Exchange controls managed by SARB; authorized dealers required for cross-border flows.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: FSCA declared crypto as financial product; licensing required for crypto asset service providers.

name: Turkey
fx_cross_border_restriction: FX market active but CBRT imposes periodic controls; lira conversion requirements.
fx_regulator_body: Central Bank of the Republic of Türkiye / CMB
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto payments banned for commerce; new licensing framework under development by CMB.

name: South Korea
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open for current account; capital transactions require BOK reporting.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Virtual Asset User Protection Act enacted; exchanges must register with FIU.

name: Japan
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market with reporting requirements for large transactions.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Stablecoin legislation enacted 2023; licensed exchanges operate under FSA oversight.

name: Canada
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX regime with FINTRAC AML reporting requirements.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto trading platforms must register with provincial securities regulators; AML registration with FINTRAC.

name: Switzerland
fx_cross_border_restriction: Fully open FX market; strong AML framework under AMLA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: FINMA provides clear regulatory framework; DLT Act enables tokenized securities and stablecoins.

name: New Zealand
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market with AML/CFT requirements under AMLCFT Act.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: No specific crypto legislation; treated as property for tax; AML registration required.

name: Germany
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open EU single market; free capital movement within EEA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: EU MiCA framework fully applicable; BaFin licenses crypto custodians and exchanges.

name: France
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open EU single market; free capital movement within EEA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: EU MiCA framework; AMF PSAN registration required for crypto service providers.

name: Netherlands
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open EU single market; free capital movement within EEA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: EU MiCA framework; DNB registration required for crypto service providers.

name: Panama
fx_cross_border_restriction: Dollarized economy; open FX regime with banking secrecy traditions.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: No specific crypto regulation; crypto law was vetoed in 2022; gray area.

name: Egypt
fx_cross_border_restriction: Managed float; CBE controls FX allocation; dollar shortages have been recurring.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: CBE has historically banned crypto trading for banks; limited sandbox initiatives.

name: Malaysia
fx_cross_border_restriction: BNM manages FX via prudential rules; onshore ringgit market restrictions.
fx_regulation_name: FSA 2013 and BNM FX Administration Rules
digital_bank_crypto_policy: SC regulates digital asset exchanges; BNM does not recognize crypto as legal tender.

name: Nigeria
fx_cross_border_restriction: Multiple exchange rate windows; CBN controls FX allocation; naira under pressure.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: CBN lifted banking ban in 2023; SEC regulates digital assets; eNaira CBDC launched.

name: Kenya
fx_cross_border_restriction: Generally convertible; CBK monitors large transfers; AML requirements apply.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: No specific crypto regulation; CBK cautious but no ban; CMA exploring framework.

name: Italy
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open EU single market; free capital movement within EEA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: EU MiCA framework applicable; CASP authorization supervised under national competent authorities.

name: Spain
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open EU single market; free capital movement within EEA.
digital_bank_crypto_policy: EU MiCA framework applicable; VASP/CASP requirements supervised by competent authorities.

name: Denmark
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market under EU single market rules with AML obligations.
fx_regulation_name: Danish Financial Business Act / EU MiCA
digital_bank_crypto_policy: CASP activities aligned with EU framework; ongoing supervisory implementation.

name: Sweden
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market with robust AML/CTF controls and reporting obligations.
fx_regulation_name: Swedish Foreign Exchange Act / EU MiCA
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto-asset supervision follows EU framework with local supervisory requirements.

name: Norway
fx_cross_border_restriction: Open FX market with EEA-aligned prudential and AML requirements.
fx_regulation_name: Financial Institutions Act / EEA regulatory framework
digital_bank_crypto_policy: Crypto services are permitted with AML registration and supervisory controls.
